data: Respondents were asked how often in the past 30 days they felt hopeless. Respondents could choose from among five response categories: "All of the time," "Most of the time," "Some of the time," "A little of the time," or "None of the time." "All" and "Most" are combined.

caption: Crude percentages of feeling hopeless all or most of the time for adults aged 18 and over (standard errors), United States
